mapper.select: SELECT d.id, d.dept_name, d.dept_code, d.parent_id, d.sort, d.leader_id, d.description, d.create_time, d.update_time, d.deleted FROM sys_department d WHERE d.parent_id = #{parentId} AND d.deleted = 0 ORDER BY d.sort ASC

SELECT d.id, d.dept_name, d.dept_code, d.parent_id, d.sort, d.leader_id, d.description, d.create_time, d.update_time, d.deleted, pd.dept_name as parent_name, u.real_name as leader_name FROM sys_department d LEFT JOIN sys_department pd ON d.parent_id = pd.id AND pd.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON d.leader_id = u.id AND u.deleted = 0 WHERE d.deleted = 0 ORDER BY d.sort ASC

SELECT d.id, d.dept_name, d.dept_code, d.parent_id, d.sort, d.leader_id, d.description, d.create_time, d.update_time, d.deleted, pd.dept_name as parent_name, u.real_name as leader_name FROM sys_department d LEFT JOIN sys_department pd ON d.parent_id = pd.id AND pd.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON d.leader_id = u.id AND u.deleted = 0 WHERE d.id = #{id} AND d.deleted = 0
